title: Filter several columns at once
excerpt:
It would be great to be able to filter several columns at once, also combined with several search words if needed. For instance, “if columns X, Y or Z contains the text A, B or C”.

posts.author: JessicaA (Jessica Arhammar)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great to be able to filter several columns at once, also combined with several search words if needed. For instance, “if columns X, Y or Z contains the text A, B or C”.
This would help reduce the number of filters when doing complicated filtering.
